title: Dense, Aerated Greek Chicken Lotus-Leaf Gyro Wrap
description: A flavorful and nutritious Greek-inspired dish featuring chicken stock, brine-wet chicken, wrapped in a crispy lotus leaf.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, oregano, thyme, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and pepper to make a marinade.
Add the chicken breasts to the marinade and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the cooked chicken to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat the chicken stock in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Bring the lotus leaves to a boil in water for 30 seconds, then immediately submerge in an ice bath to stop cooking.
To assemble the wraps, lay a lotus leaf flat on a plate and place a few slices of chicken in the center.
Add a spoonful of heated chicken stock and top with mixed greens and sliced red onion.
Fold the lotus leaf over the filling to form a tight cylinder and serve immediately.
